description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized SUV with a metallic gray exterior and a streamlined, boxy silhouette. The vehicle features four passenger doors, a rear hatch, and large windows for visibility. The front end is equipped with a prominent grille and integrated headlights, while the rear showcases vertical taillights and a visible license plate. The roof includes rails for additional cargo capacity, and the wheels are alloy with a multi-spoke design. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to have two rows of seating and a spacious cabin typical of family-oriented SUVs.
description: A metallic gray, mid-sized SUV with four doors, alloy wheels, and a spacious, modern design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing vertical taillights, rear hatch, and license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, alloy wheels, and roof rails.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the grille, headlights, and windshield.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing doors, wheels, and roof rails.
attribute_wheel_design: Five double-spoke alloy wheels with a polished metallic finish
